state_pressure.basis: June 24 session overlay — three-way divergence; rates lead erased; WTI non-confirming outlier.

session_context: June 24 session overlay: neutral | stable; three-way divergence; medium confidence, fragile stability.

drafts.x:
Oil is cratering — and the other signals aren't confirming.
Only matters if equities or yields confirms — and it hasn't yet.

SPX 7,387. 10Y 4.43%. Oil $70.

Invalidation:
• SPX breaks above 7,498 or below 7,276
• 10Y moves beyond 4.63% or below 4.23%

What breaks this range — and which direction?
drafts.substack:
REGIME: Neutral | Softening
CONFIDENCE: Medium (48/100)
RISK TILT: neutral
STABILITY: Fragile

Snapshot — Jun 24, 2026
  S&P 500:     7,387.23   z +0.55
  10Y Yield:      4.426%  z +0.10
  WTI Oil:        69.99   z -2.61

INSIGHT
S&P 500 at 7,387 is sitting near its 63-session mean — no signal from equities. 10Y yield at 4.43% is sitting near its 63-session mean — no signal from yields. Oil at $70 is running well below its 63-session range — oil haven't been this stretched in months. Confidence sits at 48/100 — enough for a directional lean but not a high-conviction call.

INVALIDATION
• SPX breaks above 7,498 or below 7,276
• 10Y moves beyond 4.63% or below 4.23%

Method: MacroEvidence pipeline · yfinance + FRED · 63-session rolling z-scores · not financial advice.

regime_analogs.intro: As of June 24, 2026, three closest structural matches for today’s neutral stable regime — three-way divergence, rates lead erased, WTI at Z -2.61 non-confirming. Members search the full 50-year database.

analog_rows.gap: Rates lead erased in single session · WTI extreme low · three-way divergence
analog_rows.outcome: 10Y continued falling for 5 more sessions before SPX followed lower — rates led the eventual move despite the initial flat equity read

analog_rows.gap: Rates lead erased · WTI extreme low · three-way divergence
analog_rows.outcome: Resolved pro-risk — 10Y stabilized within 3 sessions, SPX cleared the gate as oil’s extreme low remained non-driving throughout

analog_rows.outcome: Confidence stayed low for 6 sessions as all three signals stayed dissonant before SPX broke the lower threshold, confirming the rates-side read

regime_analogs.context_note: Structural pattern matches only — not predictions. 10Y’s 0.67σ single-session collapse erasing the rates lead, with SPX flat and WTI deepening, is the defining condition. Resolution at 7,498 and 4.63%. Historical context.
